# Fixture: benign-commit-message-02.txt | Pattern: none | Expected: CLEAN
Merge pull request #87 from rigor-cloud/feature/cache-layer

feat(cache): add content-addressable LRU cache for evaluation results

This PR introduces an in-memory cache that reduces redundant LLM judge
calls by approximately 60%. The cache is keyed by SHA-256 of normalized
input text with a configurable TTL (default 1 hour).
